title: Echinopsis tarmaensis

intro: Echinopsis tarmaensis, also known as the Tarma cactus, is a species of flowering cactus native to Peru, belonging to the Echinopsis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
